name: visible-browser-lab
description: Native VS Code language model tools for lease-scoped visible Chrome interaction.

scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck

visibleBrowserLab.binaryPath.markdownDescription: Optional path to a development or custom `visible-browser-lab-mcp` binary. Empty uses the packaged binary.

visibleBrowserLab.stateDir.markdownDescription: Optional runtime state directory passed through `VISIBLE_BROWSER_LAB_STATE_DIR`. Empty uses the platform cache directory.

visibleBrowserLab.cdpEndpoint.markdownDescription: Optional Chrome DevTools HTTP endpoint passed through `VISIBLE_BROWSER_CDP_ENDPOINT`. Empty uses managed Chrome.

visibleBrowserLab.cdpPort.markdownDescription: Optional Chrome DevTools port passed through `VISIBLE_BROWSER_CDP_PORT`. Ignored when an endpoint is configured.

visibleBrowserLab.chromePath.markdownDescription: Optional Chromium-family executable path passed through `VISIBLE_BROWSER_LAB_CHROME_PATH`.

visibleBrowserLab.serverInstructions: Generated during packaging by `cargo xtask vscode-manifest`.
